title: ‘Incredible work’: Ukrainian F-16 downs Russian fighter jet for first time
summary: A Ukrainian F-16 fighter jet successfully shot down a Russian fighter jet, marking the first confirmed air-to-air kill by a Ukrainian F-16. This event, confirmed by a top U.S. general, signifies a notable increase in Ukraine's air power, utilizing an older fighter platform.

title: BETA teams with GE, Sikorsky for militarized unmanned aircraft
summary: BETA is collaborating with GE Aerospace and Sikorsky to develop a militarized unmanned aircraft, the MV250. The aircraft will feature a hybrid-electric propulsion system from GE and an autonomy stack from Sikorsky, designed for diverse military missions.

title: Australia whips together a hybrid air defense weapon
summary: Australia successfully tested a 'Frankenstein' medium-range air defense system last month. This novel system combines existing and new capabilities in an innovative way to create a hybrid air defense solution.

title: A new, British CCA enters the fray at the Farnborough airshow
summary: A new British Collaborative Combat Aircraft (CCA) concept was introduced at the Farnborough Airshow. This entry signals growing competition and development in the field of autonomous combat aircraft.

title: Helicopters Just Took Center Stage In Rim Of The Pacific Sinking Exercises
summary: During the Rim of the Pacific (RIMPAC) exercise, allied rotorcraft successfully employed at least four different missile types against retired warships in sinking exercises. This demonstrated the expanding anti-ship capabilities of helicopters in a major international naval drill.

title: New Atlas goes to Farnborough 2026
summary: The Farnborough International Airshow in the UK is one of the world's premier aerospace events, where major industry announcements and billion-dollar deals are as common as muffins. title: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
summary: Amazon is launching an update to its Alexa Plus assistant that will allow it to connect to smart home devices in new ways. title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

title: Tesla’s door handles may spur new US safety rules
summary: The new rule-making process follows a series of incidents, including fatal ones, in which people have become stuck inside cars.

title: Strategy-led group pledges $15M to quantum-proof Bitcoin network
summary: A consortium led by Strategy and BlackRock has pledged $15 million to secure the Bitcoin network from the threat of a quantum computing breakthrough.

title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
summary: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

title: Gemini sent $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after joint motion with CFTC
summary: The Bitcoin donation can be used to support Donald Trump as a New York court considers whether to reverse a $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
summary: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
summary: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.
